title: wurmbea tenuis subsp. tenuis
intro: Wurmbea tenuis subsp. tenuis is a plant species in the family Colchicaceae, also known as the autumn starflower. It has been found to possess medicinal properties due to the presence of colchicine, a compound that has anti-inflammatory and antitumor effects. The health benefits of Wurmbea tenuis subsp. tenuis include its potential use in the treatment of gout, rheumatoid arthritis, and certain types of cancer, although its use is often limited by its toxicity. Wurmbea tenuis subsp. tenuis is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, but its use requires careful dosing and under the guidance of a medical professional due to its potential risks.
